result:
The R script has been successfully executed. The cleaned data file has been created at data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 observations and 5 variables (NSID, educma, educpa, educdtlma, educdtlpa). The script:

1. Loaded all three wave files from data/input/ using readr::read_delim()
2. Merged the datasets using full_join by NSID
3. Selected only parental education variables
4. Consolidated detailed education variables (educdtlma, educdtlpa) by prioritizing valid positive responses across waves (Wave 4 > Wave 2 > Wave 1)
5. Harmonized missing codes to the standard scheme (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -3=Not asked, -2=Schedule not applicable, -1=Item not applicable)
6. Created collapsed variables (educma, educpa) mapping 20 detailed categories to 5 NVQ levels
7. Applied value labels to all variables
8. Saved the final dataset as CSV
